name: Panaseer
description: Continuous controls monitoring with API for security posture data.

seo.title: Panaseer — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Panaseer: Continuous controls monitoring with API for security posture data.

when_to_use: Continuous controls monitoring for security posture reporting
Security metrics API for board-level risk dashboards
Control effectiveness measurement across security tools
Asset coverage gap detection for CISO decision-making
SOC 2 and ISO 27001 control validation via telemetry data

pros: Unifies control data from dozens of security tools
API-first exposure of posture data into dashboards
Strong metrics and coverage reporting for CISOs
Flexible data model adapts to custom frameworks
cons: Long implementation cycles with heavy data engineering
Requires mature security stack to deliver value
Value depends on quality of underlying tool data
review.verdict: CCM platform for mature enterprises that want measurable posture; not a quick-win tool.
review.best_for: Large enterprise CISOs consolidating posture signals across fragmented security tooling.
review.not_for: Smaller orgs without a mature, integrated security stack to feed the platform.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
